features.name: User Authentication
features.description: JWT-based authentication with login and registration

features.name: Role-Based Access Control
features.description: Enforce role-based permissions for all operations

features.name: Policy Search
features.description: Search policies by policy_number, name, ssn_tin, type, loss_date, location with exact and partial matches

features.name: Policy CRUD Operations
features.description: Create, retrieve, update policy records with validation

features.name: Policy Details Display
features.description: Display complete policy details including insured, vehicle, location, coverage

features.name: SSN/TIN Masking
features.description: Mask SSN/TIN to show only last 4 digits in responses

features.name: Claim Search
features.description: Search claims by claim_number, policy, status, loss_date

features.name: Claim CRUD Operations
features.description: Create, retrieve, update claim records linked to policies

features.name: Claim History
features.description: Display list of past claims for a policy, sorted by loss_date, filterable by status

features.name: Claim-Level Policy Data
features.description: Add/edit policy information at claim level when policy unverified, track separately from policy

features.name: Subrogation Referral
features.description: Support referral of claims to subrogation

features.name: Scheduled Payments Management
features.description: Manage scheduled payments with type, total, balance, due, recipient

features.name: Injury Incident Details
features.description: Capture and store injury incident details, coding info, carrier involvement

features.name: Payment Creation
features.description: Create payments linked to claims/policies with multiple payment methods

features.name: Payment Lifecycle Management
features.description: Support void, reverse, reissue operations on payments

features.name: Payment Details Management
features.description: Manage multiple payees, portions, deductions per payment

features.name: Reserve Line Allocation
features.description: Allocate payments across multiple reserve lines, mark as eroding/non-eroding

features.name: Tax Reporting
features.description: Designate payments as tax reportable, capture tax ID, withhold income tax

features.name: EFT and Wire Transfers
features.description: Create EFT and wire transfers with required banking details

features.name: Joint Payee Management
features.description: Support payments with multiple joint payees

features.name: Vendor Onboarding
features.description: Onboard vendors and claimants with payment method verification

features.name: KYC Verification
features.description: Perform KYC/identity verification for vendors and claimants

features.name: Audit Logging
features.description: Log all actions with user_id, timestamp, before/after values

features.name: Audit Log Retrieval
features.description: Query and retrieve audit logs for compliance and investigation

features.name: Document Attachment
features.description: Attach documents to policies, claims, and payments

features.name: Data Encryption
features.description: Encrypt sensitive data (SSN/TIN, payment info) at rest and in transit

features.name: PCI-DSS Compliance
features.description: Ensure all payment data handling is PCI-DSS compliant

features.name: Health Check Endpoints
features.description: Implement /health/live and /health/ready endpoints

features.name: Error Handling
features.description: Implement consistent error responses with proper HTTP status codes

features.name: CORS Configuration
features.description: Configure CORS middleware for cross-origin requests
